ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "monitoring_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the monitoring was conducted */,
  "accession_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset, including the source and format */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the dataset */,
  "last_submission" TEXT /* Date of the last submission or update */,
  "acession_id" INTEGER /* Unique accession ID for the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., IHEB, external agency) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score or rating of the dataset */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last verified */,
  "verification_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the verifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_verification_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("verification_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country's data submissions */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Completed, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure storage */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions or roles the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
